title: Azure AI Foundry routine service
description: Service-level configuration for a host: azure.ai.routine entry. The service key is the routine name. A routine is a scheduled or event-driven invocation of an agent declared as an azure.ai.agent service. A routine service must uses: the agent it references.

cron.description: Cron expression. Required for type: schedule.

filter.description: Event/webhook filter. Required for type: webhook | event.

agent.description: Name of the azure.ai.agent service the routine invokes.

input.description: Input payload passed to the agent. Values may use ${VAR} (azd env, resolved client-side) or ${{...}} (Foundry server-side, passed through untouched).
